_publications._publicationTitle: In vivo synaptic transmission and morphology in mouse models of Tuberous sclerosis, Fragile X syndrome, Neurofibromatosis type 1, and Costello syndrome.

_contextSnippet: We found some evidence that EPSP-AP coupling was stronger in the NF1 mice, but this was not observed in the CS mouse, which is like NF1 a RASopathy
details: No changes in EPSP-AP coupling were observed in the CS mouse model, despite being a RASopathy like NF1
